title: sabulina glaucina
intro: Sabulina glaucina, also known as Sea Sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is a succulent plant that grows in sandy areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sabulina glaucina include its ability to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
